full_text:
Did you know you can build your own AI telephony agent in just minutes? . With VideoSDK, the future of communication is here! . Imagine handling inbound and outbound calls like a pro! . Let’s dive in!

Creating your AI agent starts with Python 3.12 or higher. . You’ll need a VideoSDK account for that crucial VIDEOSDK_TOKEN! . The magic happens when calls route through a SIP provider like Twilio. . It’s seamless, it’s powerful, and it’s real-time!

Let’s set up your AI agent! First, create your core logic file, main.py. . Don’t forget the requirements file for dependencies! . Store your sensitive info in the .env file. . It’s super easy to run locally!

What’s the architecture? . Calls come in from the phone network, enter VideoSDK, and then reach your AI agent! . It’s like having a personal assistant that never sleeps! . This setup is a game changer for businesses!

Don’t wait to transform your communication! . With VideoSDK, you can create an AI telephony agent that’s simple yet powerful! . Dive into the documentation and start building your own AI agent today! . The future is calling!
